pending.title: Application pending
pending.desc: Your Reader application has been submitted and is awaiting admin review. You will be notified once a decision is made.

approved.title: You are a Reader!
approved.desc: Congratulations! Your application has been approved. Update your profile and start receiving questions.

rejected.title: Previous application was rejected
rejected.can_resubmit: You can submit a new application below.

header.title: Become a Reader
header.subtitle: Share your Tarot reading abilities with the community. Tell us why you want to become a Reader.

form.social_links_hint: At least one link (Facebook or Instagram or TikTok) is required for admin verification.
form.intro_placeholder: Share your Tarot experience, your specialty focus, and your consultation style...

validation.bio_min: Introduction must be at least 20 characters.
validation.specialties_min: Please choose at least one specialty.
validation.years_min: Years of experience must be at least 1.
validation.diamond_min: Service price must be at least 50 Diamond.
validation.social_required: At least one social link is required.
validation.facebook_invalid: Facebook URL is invalid or host is not supported.
validation.instagram_invalid: Instagram URL is invalid or host is not supported.
validation.tiktok_invalid: TikTok URL is invalid or host is not supported.
